reviews.review_text: Nice clean well located park. Friendly people great all round. I highly recommend this park A+

I thought we would have a good experience here because it is solely a cabin park but the cabin was dirty and very old. A lot of things in the cabin were broken, it has not been maintained at all even the outside was dirty. Not good enough for $155 per night.
Staff were friendly and helpful. Price was a little bit high for the type of accommodation. On par with hotel rates. But the place was clean, well maintained.

We booked and paid for a Deluxe Family Cabin, and it was anything but deluxe. The only thing “deluxe” about it was an extra set of bunks, certainly not the cleanliness, maintenance, or overall standard.

The cabin was dirty on arrival. There were someone else’s dirty socks left in the bathroom cupboard, which immediately set the tone. The entire cabin floor was filthy. I wiped it with a towel and it came away black. The shower was dirty and mouldy, clearly not properly cleaned between guests.

Basic safety and maintenance were also lacking. The TV remote had no back on it, leaving the batteries exposed, not ideal when staying with a toddler who could easily access them. The range hood light didn’t work, the kitchen curtain was broken, and overall the cabin felt poorly maintained.

The pool area had no shade at all, despite visible anchor points for shade sails. In warm weather, this made the pool almost unusable for families with young children.

Other basics were missing too. There were no tissues and no face washers, which you would expect as a minimum in a “deluxe” cabin.

On top of this, there was a shop alarm going off at ridiculous hours, disrupting sleep, and an abusive, loud neighbouring guest, with no apparent management intervention.

For the price paid, this stay was completely unacceptable. The standard does not match the description, and we left feeling frustrated and disappointed. I would not recommend this park unless serious improvements are made to cleanliness, maintenance, and guest management.

This place is pretty good all round I've stayed here with a big group of family's on two separate occasions.
Friendly staff they are accommodating they looked after use.

Absolutely love this accommodation.  Wonderful people. Easy going and very understanding is an issue arose.

Love love love for smallish groups travelling. Close to Plaza shopping too.
Cabin smelt funky. Close to great Vietnamese food
Great overall

We had a lovely stay for the weekend. Close by to Riverside Mall. Staff were lovely and very accommodating. I stayed in the deluxe family villa, it was spacious enough for my family of 5. Very neat and tidy. Will definitely be staying here again. Can’t fault anything!

Great place and friendly staff. We got a great room right across from the pool.
Would stay there again

Booked a cabin and family all came down sick with flu and covid called to ask to put a hold on the accommodation and was not empathetic at all was happy for us to come and spread covid in her park however we were not well enough to even get in the car .no offer of coming another time which we wanted to and no offer of return of funds I understand there is a policy but what happened to customer service especially in this time of cost of living crises and the fact that we will be coming to Shepparton again however will be choose to go here again.

I booked the accommodation cabin 17 It was not clean found bins are full not a clean cabin, hair on the bed and front door lock hard to lock overall bad experience so I wont recommend Anyone to stay there..
All good all done ✔️ 👍
Good value family cabins
Air conditioning not heating , very noisy from traffic,handy to supermarket and shopping.

We had a great stay at riverside.
Very clean amenities, convenient location and friendly staff.

Really convenient location on the way in to Shepparton. Cabins are nicely fitted out, although no tissues in our cabin, and the fridge strangely has nowhere to stand up bottles or cans. Some basic coffee and tea on offer, and plenty of kitchen essentials. Our bed was firm but nice and very warm. Split-system air-con was great. Easy parking, a nice swimming pool and BBQ facilities also on site. Small TV  but hey, can't complain.
Clean and tidy and pleasant managers
The cabin was lovely and spacious.
I was running late the reception hours. My dad informed them  that I was running and they were happy to leave the key for the cabin out. The cabin was nicely presented on arrival
Perfect spot, quiet and clean. This is the go to accommodation when working in the area
Close to plaza and river, car wash, take away. Very clean, great service, coin washing machine and dryer, dryer works exceptionally well. Swimming pool was amazing. BBQ area well presented

Absolutely recommend  great accommodation the units are lovely friendly people great owners great facilities  very peaceful and a safe well lit place all round  great location and at a great price  highly recommend to all

Lovely women in reception helped us with laundry, room was excellent and clean.

Best of all was the pool so cold and refreshing one of the best pools I have ever been in.
Staff were great and this place is so relaxing. It’s peaceful and clean and they have all the kitchen stuff you need in the cabins. BBQ area is undercover for rainy days.

I have no idea why anyone would stay there. Stuck between the noisy main road in and out of town and the massive wall of the shopping centre. So unless you plan to go shopping for several days, avoid this place.
Just rows of cabins on what could be a car park. And don't get fooled by the name, there is a big fence blocking access to the river.
As someone else said, it looks like a cabin storage or sales yard.
Rooms provided are clean. We have been provided with all the necessary bedding, kitchen items and toiletries needed for a comfortable stay.
Beautifully maintained cabins. Great for a stopover. Next to the shopping centre.

I thought this was a sales yard for cabin homes and was shocked to find out it was actually where we were booked in to stay. It was on the main drag right next to Riverside shopping centre so our view was a massive Harvey Norman sign. The beds were the worst beds we’ve ever slept on and I mean the worst. I can’t imagine anything harder other than sleeping on concrete. I would not recommend this place to anyone. Actually I would go out of my way to tell people NOT to stay there.
Lovely clean and had everything we needed
Clean and tidy. Very noisy at times from highway.
Found a toe nail in my room when I got there. Dirty (mold on windows)and uncomfortable  cabins

We stayed for one night during a road trip. Sleep quality was good, even though the park is located on a busy road in a busy area. |The cabin was very basic. I'm not sure how old this park and its cabins are, but the inside looks very dated, but hey, what matters is cleanliness. The place was very clean, which is great!|We were met by friendly owners who were very helpful.|Our cabin was number 10, not facing the road but rather facing towards Harvey Norman. This cabin offers the best uninterrupted view of the Harvey Norman sign that anyone could possibly want. |The location has more positives, though, that being that the park is close to the CBD, fast food joints (KFC, McDonalds), countless shops, the lake, parks, a museum and so on. Close to everything and so close to Harvey Norman that you could simply stroll there if you feel like buying furniture or electronics on your holiday. |Good for an overnight stay. Photo from Google street view added as I didn't get a chance to take photos. You can see just how great that view of Harvey Norman is, so close!
Excellent service friendly very clean rooms...Handy to Riverside Plaza and 3 minutes to drive to town centre will recommend 100 percent
2 stars
Great for tradies, clean and tidy. Only downfalls were the bed is really hard and uncomfortable along with the couch.
